evidences.title: ET to UTC Converter - Time.now
evidences.content: #### What is ET to UTC Conversion? ET to UTC conversion helps you translate time between Eastern Time and Coordinated Universal Time. ET encompasses both EST (UTC-5) and EDT (UTC-4) used on the U.S. East Coast. UTC is the global time standard that never changes and serves as the reference for all world timezones. The time difference varies between 4-5 hours. #### Time Zone Information Eastern Time (ET): Generic term encompassing EST (winter) and EDT (summer) in New York, Toronto, Montreal, and Miami. Automatically switches between UTC-5 and UTC-4. Coordinated Universal Time (UTC): The global time standard that never changes. Successor to GMT and used worldwide as the reference for all timezones. Also known as "Zulu Time" in aviation. [...] Time Difference: UTC is 5 hours ahead of EST (winter) and 4 hours ahead of EDT (summer). The difference changes twice yearly with daylight saving transitions. #### Daylight Saving Time Impact Winter Period (EST): From first Sunday in November to second Sunday in March, ET is UTC-5, making UTC 5 hours ahead Summer Period (EDT): From second Sunday in March to first Sunday in November, ET is UTC-4, making UTC 4 hours ahead UTC Stability: UTC neve...

ET is 4 hours behind of UTC. If you are in ET, the most convenient time to accommodate all parties is between 9:00 am and 2:00 pm for a conference call or meeting. In UTC, this will be a usual working time of between 1:00 pm and 6:00 pm. If you want to reach out to someone in UTC and you are available anytime, you can schedule a call between 3:00 am and 7:00 pm your time. This time span will be between 7:00 am and 11:00 pm UTC time. evidences.title: EST to UTC - Online Converter
evidences.content: Based International Air Transport Association (IATA) timezone codes. Time zones use hours and minutes offset from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), most a whole number of hours, a few are offset by 30 or 45 minutes. Eastern Standard Time (EST) is UTC-5:00, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) is UTC-4:00, this time zone is called Eastern Time Zone (ET) in the United States, parts of eastern Canada, Mexico, Panama and the Caribbean Islands. Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) is the primary time standard now, time zones around the world are expressed using offsets from UTC, UTC offset is the difference in hours and minutes from UTC, a time zone can be determined by adding or subtracting the number of UTC offset. [...] Converter supports daylight saving time (DST) or summer time, if the target location is currently using DST time zone, converter will automatically calculate and display local summer time.
